rag_rules: Enclose AGREE contracts within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Place component type contracts (assumptions, guarantees, constants) in the component type annex.
generic_rules: Use case-provided thresholds and visible feature names in contracts.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees.
Declare constants and equations using `const name : type = value;` and `eq name : type = expression;`.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for assumptions and guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly as AGREE variables.
Avoid using implementation-level subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL scope notes beyond placement of annexes
